caption: A split-screen video feed features a woman and a man in separate remote locations. The woman, on the left, has red hair and wears red earrings and a blue patterned shirt. The man, on the right, has a bald head, a white goatee, and wears black-rimmed glasses with a blue button-down shirt. Behind the man is a blue wall with a framed picture and a sign that partially reads "OPEN". A blue graphic banner runs along the bottom of the screen. The left side of the banner says "FOCUS" and "with Margaret Harrington", while the right side says "No More Time", "Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty", and features a "TOWN MEETING TV" logo. Across the sequence, the woman speaks and looks toward the man, while the man remains relatively still, looking toward the camera and listening.
